New Media and Communication

Internship Information

MENU

The students
of the New Media Department of the Istanbul Okan University are obliged to complete
mandatory internships for at least 30 days in organizations and institutions
working in digital media fields. 
Students are free to choose where to complete their internship; if
required, they are directed to the organizations and institutions with which
the department has close relations.
